title: Font Range
text: Font Range Number of available Uniface character sets (Font 0 through Font 7) for which a button is displayed when this panel is used as a session panel. Valid values are 0 through 7 . Description The character set buttons appear only if the panel is used as a session panel on an application shell. They do not appear on a pop-up panel or a form panel.
